zh.Kinlet, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Blount於大約1410年出生時，她的父親John Blount III27歲，母親Alice Alicia Maud Bere17歲。她於大約1435年與Thomas Bettenham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1440年之後。

zh-hans.Kinlet, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Blount于大约1410年出生时，她的父亲John Blount III27岁，母亲Alice Alicia Maud Bere17岁。她于大约1435年与Thomas Bettenham结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1440年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Blount was born about 1410, her father, John Blount III, was 27 and her mother, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, was 17. She married Thomas Bettenham about 1435. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1440.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Blount est née environ 1410, son père, John Blount III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bettenham environ 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1440.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Blount um 1410 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Blount III 27 und ihre Mutter Alice Alicia Maud Bere 17. Sie hat um 1435 Thomas Bettenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1440.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Blount è nata il circa 1410, sua padre, John Blount III, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bettenham circa 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1440.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Blountが約1410年に生まれた時，父John Blount IIIは27歳，母Alice Alicia Maud Bereは17歳であった。約1435年にThomas Bettenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1440年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Blount(이)가 대략 1410년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Blount III(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Alicia Maud Bere(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 Thomas Bettenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1410, seu pai, John Blount III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bettenham aproximadamente 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1440.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Blount родилась около 1410 г., её отцу по имени John Blount III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Alicia Maud Bere, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bettenham около 1435 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1440 г.
